title: galium sylvestre subsp. nitidulum
intro: Galium sylvestre subsp. nitidulum, also known as the shiny bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium sylvestre plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Galium sylvestre subsp. nitidulum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps.
